title: hieracium picroides subsp. trichopicris
intro: Hieracium picroides subsp. trichopicris, commonly known as the Lesser Hawkbit or Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Hieracium picroides subsp. trichopicris include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe wounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
